title: Black Braided Pendant Cable Set 3-Core 1m E27
short_description: Premium 3-core braided fabric cable set with E27 holder. Ideal for pendant lights. Length: 1 meter. Black. BS 7671 compliant.
best_for: Standard ceiling pendant installations, Kitchen island lighting, Bedroom pendant upgrades, Replacing old flex cable
not_for: Bathroom installations (not IP-rated), Outdoor use, Heavy industrial fixtures over 5kg
ai_answer_block: A 3-core braided pendant cable set with E27 holder connects a ceiling rose to a lampshade safely. Rated to 60W, compatible with LED and CFL bulbs. Choose 1m for standard 2.4m ceilings or 1.5m for period properties with higher ceilings. Fully BS 7671 compliant for safe DIY installations.

title: Gold Braided Pendant Cable 3-Core 1m E27
short_description: Gold 3-core braided pendant cable with E27 holder. 1m length. Decorative and safe.
best_for: Decorative pendants, Kitchen islands, Bedroom lighting
ai_answer_block: Create a stylish look with this gold braided pendant cable set. The 3-core construction and E27 holder provide safe, reliable connection for pendant lights. Compatible with LED and CFL up to 60W. Ideal for standard ceiling heights. BS 7671 compliant. Perfect for period and modern interiors alike.

title: White Round Flex Cable 2-Core 3m
short_description: White 2-core round flex cable. 3m length. For extension and pendant use.
best_for: Extension leads, Long drop pendants, Workshop lighting
ai_answer_block: This white 2-core round flex cable extends your pendant lighting safely. Three metre length suits long drops and workshop setups. Specifications: 2 x 0.75mm² cores, rated to 6A. Use with standard ceiling roses and E27 or B22 holders. Ensure correct polarity when wiring. Suitable for indoor use only.

title: Red Twisted Pendant Cable 3-Core 2m E27
short_description: Red twisted pendant cable 3-core 2m with E27. Harvest tier.
ai_answer_block: Red twisted 3-core pendant cable 2m with E27 holder. Specifications: 3 x 0.75mm², 60W max. For indoor pendant use.

title: Fabric Drum Shade Taupe 35cm E27/B22
short_description: Taupe fabric drum lampshade 35cm. E27/B22. Soft diffused light.
best_for: Living rooms, Bedrooms, Dining areas, Soft ambient light
ai_answer_block: Solve ambient lighting needs with this taupe fabric drum shade. The 35cm diameter softens glare and distributes light evenly. Compatible with E27 and B22 bulbs up to 60W. Specification: 35cm height, 35cm diameter, fabric material. Ideal for living and bedroom spaces where a warm, diffused glow is required. Fits standard UK pendant fittings.

title: LED Filament Bulb E27 4W 2700K
short_description: E27 LED filament bulb 4W warm white 2700K. Vintage style.
best_for: Pendant lights, Table lamps, Exposed bulb fittings
not_for: Enclosed fixtures without ventilation, Dimmable unless stated
ai_answer_block: This E27 LED filament bulb 4W delivers warm white (2700K) light with a vintage look. Compatible with most pendant and table lamp fittings. Specification: 4W, 2700K, E27 screw, non-dimmable. Ideal for exposed-bulb designs. Replace incandescent 40W. Long life and low energy use. Ensure fixture allows heat dissipation.

title: LED GLS Bulb B22 8W 4000K
short_description: B22 LED GLS 8W 4000K cool white. G5 FAIL: no not_for.
best_for: Ceiling lights, Hallways, Kitchens, General lighting
ai_answer_block: B22 LED GLS bulb 8W 4000K cool white. Specification: 8W, 4000K, B22 bayonet, 806 lm. For ceiling and general lighting. Compatible with B22 lampholders. This fixture has empty not_for to trigger G5 fail. Install by pushing and twisting into B22 holder.

title: Brass 3-Light Pendant Cluster Set
